mapper.select: SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.chnl_nm, a.track_cnt, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.track_id, d.track_nm, d.agency_id, d.album_id, d.reprsnt_artist_id, d.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, d.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime, c.create_dtime trackRenewDtime, c.track_sn FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track c ON a.chnl_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track d ON c.track_id = d.track_id AND d.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN d.disp_start_dtime AND d.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY c.track_sn ASC

SELECT b.chnl_id FROM (SELECT b.music_content_id, b.disp_sn, c.chnl_id, c.category_id FROM tb_chart a INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_category d ON c.category_id = d.category_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'ALL' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' GROUP BY b.music_content_id ORDER BY b.disp_sn) a INNER JOIN tb_chnl b ON a.music_content_id = b.chnl_id WHERE b.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY disp_sn

SELECT a.svc_genre_id, a.prefer_genre_id, b.chart_id, c.music_content_id chnl_id, c.disp_sn FROM ( SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, @curRank:=IF(@prevChnlId = prefer_genre_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevChnlId:=prefer_genre_id FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre, (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevChnlId:=0) r ORDER BY prefer_genre_id , disp_sn ) a INNER JOIN tb_chart b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content c ON b.chart_id = c.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl e ON e.chnl_id = c.music_content_id INNER JOIN tb_map_svc_genre_chnl f ON e.chnl_id = f.chnl_id WHERE b.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND b.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND b.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND e.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND a.rank <= 1 GROUP BY a.svc_genre_id , a.prefer_genre_id , b.chart_id ,e.chnl_id, c.disp_sn ORDER BY b.chart_id , c.disp_sn

SELECT category.category_id, b.music_content_id chnl_id, b.disp_sn FROM tb_category category INNER JOIN tb_chart a ON category.category_id = a.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl d ON c.chnl_id = d.chnl_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'MOOD' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND c.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND category.category_type = 'MOOD' AND category.disp_status_type = 'Y' GROUP BY category.category_id , a.chart_id, b.disp_sn ORDER BY a.chart_id , b.disp_sn

( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.member_chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, CONCAT(d.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.update_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_member_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.member_chnl_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'MY_CHNL' LEFT JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, c.prefer_disp_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.img_size, CONCAT(d.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, music_content_cnt FROM tb_chart WHERE (svc_content_type,chart_type) IN (('ALL', 'HOURLY'), ('KIDS','DAILY')) AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN tb_prefer_disp c ON b.chart_id = c.disp_id JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'DISP' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) d ON c.prefer_disp_id = d.img_content_id )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.artist_nm as content_title, COUNT(DISTINCT e.track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, CONCAT(c.url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.update_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 20 ) a JOIN ted_artist b ON a.listen_type_id = b.artist_id AND a.listen_type = 'ARTIST' LEFT JOIN ted_artistimage c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id JOIN ted_trackartist d ON b.artist_id = d.artist_id AND d.db_sts = 'A' JOIN tb_track e ON d.track_id = e.track_id AND e.disp_status_yn = 'Y' JOIN ted_album f ON e.album_id = f.album_id AND f.db_sts = 'A' AND f.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND f.album_tp IN ('RL','SL','EP','OS','LV','RM','SP','MF') GROUP BY CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id), a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.artist_nm, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, CONCAT(c.url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.update_dtime)) )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chart_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, CONCAT(c.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, svc_content_id, chart_nm, music_content_cnt, CASE WHEN chart_type = 'NEW' THEN 'RECENT' WHEN chart_type = 'DAILY' THEN 'POPULARITY' ELSE NULL END AS chart_type FROM tb_chart t WHERE svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' AND chart_type IN ('NEW','DAILY') ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, shortcut_type, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND shortcut_type IN ('RECENT','POPULARITY') AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_content_id = c.img_content_id AND b.chart_type = c.shortcut_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(a.create_dtime, '%c월 %e일'), ' 오늘의 FLO') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size AS size, CONCAT(c.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_SML_TR' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT img_size, img_url, create_dtime, disp_sn, CASE dfk_type WHEN 'MON' THEN 0 WHEN 'TUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'WED' THEN 2 WHEN 'THU' THEN 3 WHEN 'FRI' THEN 4 WHEN 'SAT' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUN' THEN 6 END AS dfk_type FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_SML_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.disp_sn = c.disp_sn AND WEEKDAY(b.create_dtime) = c.dfk_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(a.create_dtime, '%c월 %e일'), ' 오늘의 FLO') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, CONCAT(c.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_GR_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime, CASE dfk_type WHEN 'MON' THEN 0 WHEN 'TUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'WED' THEN 2 WHEN 'THU' THEN 3 WHEN 'FRI' THEN 4 WHEN 'SAT' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUN' THEN 6 END AS dfk_type FROM tb_map_img_rcmmd_img WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_GR_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_genre_id = c.img_content_id AND WEEKDAY(b.create_dtime) = c.dfk_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(a.create_dtime, '%c월 %e일'), ' 아티스트 FLO') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, CONCAT(c.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_ATST_TR' LEFT JOIN (SELECT img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_ATST_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(a.create_dtime, '%c월 %e일'), ' 나를 위한 FLO') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size AS size, CONCAT(c.img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.create_dtime)) AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_CF_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_map_img_rcmmd_img WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_CF_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_genre_id = c.img_content_id )
ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC

SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, CONCAT(d.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(d.update_dtime)) AS url, b.renew_track_cnt, b.renew_dtime FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chnl_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHNL' LEFT JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id
